Risk: Lack of accountability and possible unauthorized access
Potential inability to recover after ransomware
Recommendation: Perform restore tests twice per year

Risk: Delayed containment and recovery of security incidents
Recommendation: Define IR roles and run tabletop exercises
Verification: Tabletop exercise reports and incident checklist

Risk: Attacker gains access to internal systems
Recommendation: Segment guest network and enforce firewall rules
Verification: Network configuration and guest access logs

Risk: Third-party access may expose patient data
Recommendation: Add vendor security clauses and conduct annual reviews
Verification: Vendor contract records and review evidence
